linear_text:
Move environment variables section

In the example-repo, move the environment variables section from the bottom of the  page to right below the first heading block on the page.
change_summary: In src/App.tsx, moved the `env-vars` <section> (Environment Variables heading + VITE_FRONTEND_URL/VITE_FRONTEND_PORT list) from the bottom of the page shell to directly after the closing </header> of the hero, so it renders below the first heading block. No other changes.

linear_text:
Change the heading to say "Hello, Alex!"

Change the heading of the frontend app to say "Hello Alex"
change_summary: In src/App.tsx, replaced the hero `<h1>` text "Build, message, and persist in one isolated runtime." with "Hello, Alex!". No other changes.
